channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Stormers face URC semi-final without key flyhalf Sacha Feinberg-Mngomezulu
item.description: The Stormers have suffered a significant setback ahead of the United Rugby Championship semi-finals after star flyhalf Sacha Feinberg-Mngomezulu sustained what appears to be a serious ankle syndesmosi...

item.title: Tanzania Reports Positive Growth in Wildlife Populations Following National Census
item.description: Tanzania has recorded a positive growth trend in its wildlife populations over the past decade, according to the newly released 2024/2025 National Wildlife Census Report. The report, presented to Pres...

item.title: Popovic weighing final Socceroos squad for World Cup with Volpato in camp and injuries opening doors
item.description: The SBS article outlines Tony Popovic’s approach as he trims the Socceroos’ provisional group ahead of the FIFA World Cup. With injuries to Riley McGree, Patrick Yazbek, and Lewis Miller opening spots...

item.title: Vice Ganda shares memories of friendship with taxi driver on Everybody Sing
item.description: In a recent episode of the ABS-CBN entertainment program Everybody Sing, Asia’s Unkabogable Superstar Vice Ganda looked back on a meaningful personal experience involving a taxi driver who became his ...

item.title: PSG and Arsenal Face Off in Champions League Final: Tactical Key Points Ahead of Budapest Clash
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain and Arsenal are set to battle in the UEFA Champions League final in Budapest, with both sides bringing different strengths and storylines into the big match. PSG are the current ho...

item.title: US Defence Secretary responds to question on alleged Indian missile test amid Agni-5 clarification
item.description: At the Shangri-La Dialogue in Singapore, a Pakistani journalist posed a question to US Secretary of War Pete Hegseth referencing an alleged Indian Agni-6 intercontinental ballistic missile (ICBM) test...

item.title: Ebola Outbreak in Congo Linked to Hunting and Consumption of Wild Meat
item.description: The recent Ebola outbreak in eastern Congo underscores the ongoing health risks associated with hunting and consuming wild animals, a practice deeply ingrained in local culture. Vendors at markets lik...

item.title: Liverpool part ways with Arne Slot as Andoni Iraola emerges as leading candidate for manager role
item.description: Liverpool Football Club have sacked manager Arne Slot following a disappointing defence of their Premier League title, announcing that they are seeking a change in direction. The decision comes after ...

item.title: Newcastle United sign Odysseas Vlachodimos from Nottingham Forest amid transfer report correction
item.description: Newcastle United has made an official addition to their squad by signing experienced goalkeeper Odysseas Vlachodimos from Nottingham Forest. The club confirmed the transfer as part of their efforts to...

item.title: Two Men Arrested in Abia for Alleged Attempted Abduction of Two-Week-Old Baby and Assault on Mother
item.description: The Abia State Police Command has arrested two young men, Nzubechi Chinagorom, 24, and Chinonso Chibundu, 25, over their alleged involvement in an attempted child theft incident in Olokoro, Umuahia So...

item.title: Bulls secure convincing URC semifinal spot against Glasgow
item.description: The Bulls delivered a dominant performance against Munster in their URC quarterfinal clash at Loftus, winning 45-14 to advance to the semifinals where they will face Glasgow Warriors. From the outset,...

item.title: United Airlines flight diverted after passenger attempts to breach cockpit during mid-air disturbance
item.description: A United Airlines flight travelling from Chicago O’Hare International Airport to Minneapolis–St Paul International Airport was forced to divert after a serious onboard disturbance involving an unruly ...

item.title: Candid 1980s Photos of Michael Jackson With Hollywood and Music Icons
item.description: This article presents a curated gallery of candid photographs of Michael Jackson taken during the 1980s, a period widely recognized as the peak of his global fame. At the time, Jackson had already bec...

item.title: Colombia crowned winner of MGI All Stars as Gazini Ganados secures Top 5 finish for the Philippines
item.description: The latest results from the MGI All Stars pageant show Colombia emerging as the overall winner, marking a strong performance in the international beauty competition. The event gathered candidates from...

item.title: University of Illinois Develops Scalable 3D Silicon Chip Technology for Higher Computing Density
item.description: Researchers at the University of Illinois Grainger College of Engineering have developed a new method for building three-dimensional (3D) silicon chips that could significantly extend the progress pre...

item.title: Paul McCartney reflects on songwriting, The Beatles memories and collaborations with Ringo Starr and The Rolling Stones
item.description: Paul McCartney has spoken to NME about his enduring passion for songwriting and the deeply personal reflections behind his 19th solo album, ‘The Boys Of Dungeon Lane’. Recorded partly in Abbey Road St...

item.title: Punjab Cabinet approves plan to regularise 65,000 government workers, ending contractual employment
item.description: In a historic decision, the Punjab Cabinet, chaired by Chief Minister Bhagwant Mann, approved a comprehensive framework to end the long-standing contractual employment system and regularise more than ...

item.title: United Airlines flight diverted to Madison after passenger attempts to access cockpit
item.description: A United Airlines flight traveling from Chicago to Minneapolis was forced to divert to Madison, Wisconsin, after a disruptive passenger allegedly attempted multiple times to breach the cockpit, accord...

item.title: Kaye Abad opens up about how she told her mother about her breast cancer diagnosis
item.description: The article focuses on actress Kaye Abad and her personal experience of revealing to her mother that she had been diagnosed with breast cancer. According to the feature published by ABS-CBN Entertainm...

item.title: Luis Manzano reacts after Eric Fructuoso accepts 101-peso deal on Kapamilya Deal or No Deal
item.description: The latest episode of the popular game show Kapamilya Deal or No Deal featured a light but tense moment involving host Luis Manzano and contestant Eric Fructuoso after a surprising low-value deal. Dur...
